name: Sophisticated Policies from Epistemic Priors
summary: arXiv:2607.19518v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sophisticated Inference is a variant of active inference often associated with recursive belief modeling and tree search. We argue that its central c...
description: arXiv:2607.19518v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Sophisticated Inference is a variant of active inference often associated with recursive belief modeling and tree search. We argue that its central computational role is simpler: within a planning horizon, it makes active inference closed-loop by allowing future actions to depend on future states and observations. This closed-loop structure can be...
author: Wouter W. L. Nuijten, Bert de Vries
